headline: UFP Technologies Extends Intuitive Deal As Concentration Risk And Upside Grow
summary: UFP Technologies extended and expanded its Manufacturing Supply Agreement with Intuitive Surgical through 2029. The amendment raises minimum purchase volumes and adds new programs tied to Intuitive Surgical systems. The deal reinforces a long running relationship between UFP Technologies and a major healthcare customer. For investors tracking NasdaqCM:UFPT, this contract update comes after a mixed share price picture. The stock trades at $208.92, with a 21.9% decline over the past 30 days...
